tagline: Land of Five Rivers: Golden Shrine Spiritual Peace & Rich Culinary Heritage

days.dateLabel: Day 1 - Sacred Amritsar & Wagah Border Patriotism

activities.title: Harmandir Sahib (The Golden Temple) Spiritual Serenity
activities.description: Witness the morning sun gleaming off the golden sanctum, walk around the sacred Amrit Sarovar pool, and partake in the community Langar.

activities.title: Authentic Amritsari Kulcha at Kesar Da Dhaba
activities.description: Savor flaky, butter-drenched tandoori kulchas paired with slow-cooked dal makhani and refreshing lassi at a century-old legendary eatery.

activities.title: Wagah-Attari Border Beating Retreat Ceremony
activities.description: Experience the electrifying patriotic enthusiasm and synchronized military parade at the India-Pakistan border flag-lowering ceremony.

activities.title: Jallianwala Bagh & Partition Museum
activities.description: Pay homage at the historic memorial gardens before exploring poignant exhibits preserving oral histories of the 1947 Partition.

activities.title: Hall Bazaar Phulkari & Jutti Shopping Stroll
activities.description: Browse vibrant traditional Phulkari embroidery dupattas, handcrafted Punjabi leather juttis, and authentic spice stalls.

activities.title: Makki Di Roti & Sarson Ka Saag Dinner at Haveli
activities.description: Dine in a village-themed village setting enjoying farm-fresh mustard greens, corn flatbread with white butter, and folk Bhangra music.

days.dateLabel: Day 3 - Royal Patiala & Anandpur Sahib Fortress

activities.title: Virasat-e-Khalsa Sikh Heritage Museum
activities.description: Explore the award-winning architectural complex in Anandpur Sahib showcasing 500 years of Sikh history and cultural evolution.

activities.title: Qila Mubarak Royal Palace Complex in Patiala
activities.description: Marvel at the majestic Rajput and Mughal blended fort architecture, ornate mirror rooms, and royal antique armory.

activities.title: Riverside Sunset Chai & Patiala Shahi Cuisine Feast
activities.description: Conclude your Punjab journey overlooking peaceful river waters with spicy Patiala shahi gosht, tandoori paneer, and sweet phirni.
